message:
Command `# Step 08 = pre-PnR STA (timing analysis on the synthesized netlist)
# Multiple corners being analyzed: max_tt_025C_1v80, max_ss_100C_1v60, etc.
# This step typically takes 5-15 min. After it: floorplan -> placement -> routing -> GDS.

# Wait 2h for PnR flow to complete multiple steps - poll every 10 min
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_wrapper.log"
LR_PID=286668

for i in $(seq 1 72); do
  sleep 600  # 10 min
  LR_ALIVE=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o pid --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  ELAPSED=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o etime --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  LOG_BYTES=$(stat -c%s "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  STEP_COUNT=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep -c "^[0-9]" || echo 0)
  FINAL_GDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  LOG_TAIL=$(tail -1 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs | cut -c1-80)

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] poll=$i | LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE}(${ELAPSED}) | step=$STEP (#$STEP_COUNT) | log=$(numfmt --to=iec $LOG_BYTES 2>/dev/null)"
  echo "  $LOG_TAIL"
  [ -n "$FINAL_GDS" ] && echo "  *** FINAL GDS: $FINAL_GDS ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane EXITED ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -40
    echo ""
    find "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/" -name "*.gds" -o -name "*.lef" -o -name "*.lib" 2>/dev/null | head -15
    echo "--- Last 60 log ---"
    tail -60 "$LOG"
    break
  fi
done` executed with exit code -1.

function.arguments:
{"command": "# Step 08 = pre-PnR STA (timing analysis on the synthesized netlist)
# Multiple corners being analyzed: max_tt_025C_1v80, max_ss_100C_1v60, etc.
# This step typically takes 5-15 min. After it: floorplan -> placement -> routing -> GDS.

# Wait 2h for PnR flow to complete multiple steps - poll every 10 min

LOG="/tmp/librelane_wrapper.log"
LR_PID=286668

for i in $(seq 1 72); do
  sleep 600  # 10 min
  LR_ALIVE=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o pid --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  ELAPSED=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o etime --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  LOG_BYTES=$(stat -c%s "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  STEP_COUNT=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep -c "^[0-9]" || echo 0)
  FINAL_GDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  LOG_TAIL=$(tail -1 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs | cut -c1-80)

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] poll=$i | LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE}(${ELAPSED}) | step=$STEP (#$STEP_COUNT) | log=$(numfmt --to=iec $LOG_BYTES 2>/dev/null)"
  echo "  $LOG_TAIL"
  [ -n "$FINAL_GDS" ] && echo "  *** FINAL GDS: $FINAL_GDS ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane EXITED ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -40
    echo ""
    find "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/" -name "*.gds" -o -name "*.lef" -o -name "*.lib" 2>/dev/null | head -15
    echo "--- Last 60 log ---"
    tail -60 "$LOG"
    break
  fi
done", "timeout": 50000}
function.name: execute_bash

content:
Command: "# Step 08 = pre-PnR STA (timing analysis on the synthesized netlist)
# Multiple corners being analyzed: max_tt_025C_1v80, max_ss_100C_1v60, etc.
# This step typically takes 5-15 min. After it: floorplan -> placement -> routing -> GDS.

# Wait 2h for PnR flow to complete multiple steps - poll every 10 min
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_wrapper.log"
LR_PID=286668

for i in $(seq 1 72); do
  sleep 600  # 10 min
  LR_ALIVE=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o pid --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  ELAPSED=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o etime --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  LOG_BYTES=$(stat -c%s "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  STEP_COUNT=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep -c "^[0-9]" || echo 0)
  FINAL_GDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  LOG_TAIL=$(tail -1 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs | cut -c1-80)

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] poll=$i | LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE}(${ELAPSED}) | step=$STEP (#$STEP_COUNT) | log=$(numfmt --to=iec $LOG_BYTES 2>/dev/null)"
  echo "  $LOG_TAIL"
  [ -n "$FINAL_GDS" ] && echo "  *** FINAL GDS: $FINAL_GDS ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane EXITED ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -40
    echo ""
    find "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/" -name "*.gds" -o -name "*.lef" -o -name "*.lib" 2>/dev/null | head -15
    echo "--- Last 60 log ---"
    tail -60 "$LOG"
    break
  fi
done" timed out
